import React, { useState } from 'react'; import Layout from '../components/Layout'; import { Card } from '../components/SharedComponents'; import { MapPin, Activity, Droplet, AlertTriangle, ThermometerSun, Filter } from 'lucide-react'; const ptmData = [ { id: 'PTM-001', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Alpha', location: 'Potline 1, Bay A', status: 'Active', currentPot: 'P-142', health: 87, fillPercentage: 68, temperature: 78, feedRate: 145 }, { id: 'PTM-002', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Beta', location: 'Potline 1, Bay B', status: 'Filling', currentPot: 'P-387', health: 92, fillPercentage: 95, temperature: 82, feedRate: 152 }, { id: 'PTM-003', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Gamma', location: 'Potline 2, Bay A', status: 'Warning', currentPot: 'P-523', health: 64, fillPercentage: 42, temperature: 95, feedRate: 128 }, { id: 'PTM-004', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Delta', location: 'Potline 2, Bay B', status: 'Critical', currentPot: 'P-689', health: 38, fillPercentage: 15, temperature: 102, feedRate: 95 }, { id: 'PTM-005', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Epsilon', location: 'Potline 3, Bay A', status: 'Active', currentPot: 'P-801', health: 89, fillPercentage: 73, temperature: 75, feedRate: 148 }, { id: 'PTM-006', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Zeta', location: 'Potline 3, Bay B', status: 'Maintenance', currentPot: 'N/A', health: 72, fillPercentage: 0, temperature: 65, feedRate: 0 }, ]; export default function PTMMonitoring() { const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState('All'); const stats = { total: ptmData.length, active: ptmData.filter(p => p.status === 'Active' || p.status === 'Filling').length, warning: ptmData.filter(p => p.status === 'Warning').length, critical: ptmData.filter(p => p.status === 'Critical').length, avgHealth: Math.round(ptmData.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.health, 0) / ptmData.length), }; const getStatusBadge = (status) => { const badges = { 'Active': 'bg-green-500/10 text-green-400', 'Filling': 'bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400', 'Warning': 'bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-400', 'Critical': 'bg-red-500/10 text-red-400', 'Maintenance': 'bg-slate-500/10 text-slate-400', }; return badges[status] || 'bg-slate-500/10 text-slate-400'; }; const openInMaps = (id) => { const ptm = ptmData.find(p => p.id === id); if (ptm) { window.open(`https://www.google.com/maps?q=20.8550,85.2084`, '_blank'); } }; const filteredData = filterStatus === 'All' ? ptmData : ptmData.filter(ptm => ptm.status === filterStatus); return (
{/* Header */}

Real-time tracking of 39 Pot Tending Machines

{/* Stats */}

{stats.warning}

{stats.critical}

{/* PTM Table */} {filteredData.map((ptm) => ( ))}

{ptm.id} {ptm.name} {ptm.location} {ptm.status} {ptm.currentPot}
= 80 ? 'bg-green-500' : ptm.health >= 60 ? 'bg-orange-500' : 'bg-red-500'}`} style={{ width: `${ptm.health}%` }} />
= 80 ? 'text-green-400' : ptm.health >= 60 ? 'text-orange-400' : 'text-red-400'}`}> {ptm.health}%
{ptm.fillPercentage}%
90 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-orange-400'}`}> {ptm.temperature}°C
); }
